person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Add a new PUT endpoint to support updating person records.
person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.human_impl: @PutMapping public Person update(@RequestBody Person person) { return repository.save(person); }

person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.

person-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Replace manual DynamicPropertySource configuration with the @ServiceConnection annotation to automatically bind Testcontainers to Spring Boot properties.
person-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin/s.human_impl: Added @ServiceConnection to PostgreSQLContainer and removed the registerMySQLProperties method.

person-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Re-enable a previously commented-out test method to restore test coverage.
person-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin/s.human_impl: Uncommented @Test and @Order(3) annotations on the getAll method.

person-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update testcontainers version to 1.19.7 to align with newer Java 21 compatibility and features.
Update Lombok version to 1.18.32 for bug fixes and potential Java 21 improvements.
Update Instancio JUnit version to 4.5.0 to leverage newer API features and Java 21 support.
Add spring-boot-testcontainers dependency to enable native Spring Boot integration with Testcontainers.
Update Jib Maven Plugin to 3.4.2 for better container image building support and Java 21 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven java.version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Upgrade Spring Boot starter parent from 2.4.2 to 3.2.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring features.

.circleci/config.yml.general_idea: Upgrade the CI environment from OpenJDK 19 to OpenJDK 21 to match the target runtime.
Switch the test job from a Docker executor to a Machine executor to support native installation of JDK 21 and potentially other system dependencies.
Add explicit steps to install and configure OpenJDK 21 via apt-get within the machine executor.
Remove the testcontainers-cloud-orb dependency and its associated setup steps, likely due to compatibility issues or migration to a different testing strategy.
Refactor the workflow to use a custom 'test' job instead of the maven orb's test job, removing context and pre-step configurations.
